exercises.code:
def label_region(r):
    match r:
        case "Lima":
            return "capital"
        case "Cusco" | "Arequipa":
            return "andina"
        case _:
            return "otra"

for r in ["Lima", "Cusco", "Piura", "Arequipa"]:
    print(r, "→", label_region(r))

exercises.code:
def status_code(code: int) -> str:
    match code:
        case 200:
            return "ok"
        case 400 | 404:
            return "client_error"
        case 500:
            return "server_error"
        case _:
            return "other"

for c in [200, 400, 404, 500, 302]:
    print(c, "→", status_code(c))

exercises.code:
rules = [
    ("missing_edad", lambda r: r.get("edad") is None, "review"),
    ("bad_doc", lambda r: r.get("doc") not in {"DNI", "CE", "PAS"}, "reject"),
    ("neg_monto", lambda r: (r.get("monto") is not None and r.get("monto") < 0), "reject"),
]

def apply_rules(row):
    for name, pred, status in rules:
        if pred(row):
            return status, name
    return "accept", "ok"

for row in [
    {"edad": None, "doc": "DNI", "monto": 1},
    {"edad": 30, "doc": "RUC", "monto": 1},
    {"edad": 30, "doc": "DNI", "monto": -1},
    {"edad": 30, "doc": "DNI", "monto": 10},
]:
    print(row, "→", apply_rules(row))
